updates.blocker: bincode 3.0.0 package contains a compile_error stub announcing the crate is unmaintained

daemon_run.shutdown: SIGTERM_WAIT_STATUS=0; stderr logged shutdown requested and shutdown complete (uptime=80s)

residual_daemon_fixes: Daemon worker threads poll shutdown and use bounded joins.
Priority pre-scan honors protected paths before dispatching candidates.
Special-location scans stay scoped to configured scanner roots.
macOS /dev/devfs is no longer registered as an actionable special location while /dev/shm remains monitored.
Adaptive throttle sleep checks the shutdown flag so SIGTERM is not delayed by 30s/60s backoff sleeps.
final_gates: env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec "cargo test --lib dry_run_does_not_delete -- --nocapture"
env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec "cargo test --test integration_tests dry_run_deletes_nothing -- --nocapture"
local nightly release daemon run at /tmp/sbh-real-macos-final-shutdownfix-20260512225455

residual_findings: priority pre-scan repeatedly exceeded the configured scan budget
active-reference visibility warnings repeated on each cycle
dry-run executor batches spent seconds in open-file safety scanning

fixes: active-reference probes are skipped when the remaining scan deadline cannot cover the platform probe budget
macOS /sbin/mount failures enter a five-minute backoff and use whichdisk during backoff
macOS/open-file probing groups related candidate roots under one safe common probe root
dry-run deletion batches skip the global open-file scan because they do not mutate the filesystem
dry-run deletion reports separate actual deletes/freed bytes from would-delete/would-free counts
